headline: Assessing Devon Energy (DVN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Cash Flow Moves
summary: Why Devon Energy is on investors’ radar Devon Energy (DVN) has been drawing fresh interest after a period of solid share price gains, with the stock showing positive returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, and year to date. See our latest analysis for Devon Energy. That recent momentum has been building for a while, with a 90 day share price return of 27.87% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.33% at a latest share price of US$46.25.
